summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex Companion module - Personal AI companion (Zara/Layla) PWA feature. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed - all 3 tabs working (chat, reminders, profile), PWA manifest and service worker accessible. Chat returns Saudi dialect responses with user's name. Reminders CRUD working. Profile editing working.

issues: Date/time picker shows 'mm/dd/yyyy, --:-- --' placeholder which is English format - should be Arabic format for RTL consistency

critical_code_review_comments: Companion module is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
Memory LRU (200 max per user) implemented correctly
Proactive message templates use {name} placeholder correctly
Daily/weekly reminder repeat logic advances trigger_at correctly
PWA manifest and service worker properly configured for mobile install
seed_data_creation: Profile created for owner user with name='زهير', avatar='zara', city='جدة'. Test reminders created and cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Companion module fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/companion/profile returns has_profile boolean and profile object, (2) PUT /api/companion/profile does upsert with merge behavior (partial updates preserve existing fields), (3) POST /api/companion/chat requires profile first (returns 400 'أنشئ ملفك الشخصي أولاً' without profile), (4) Chat uses Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM Key and returns Saudi dialect with user's name, (5) Memory stored in companion_memory collection with 200 max per user (LRU), (6) Reminders support none/daily/weekly repeat - daily advances trigger_at by 1 day when fired, (7) POST /api/companion/trigger-proactive generates proactive message based on time of day and queues it, (8) GET /api/companion/pending returns undelivered proactive messages and due reminders, marks them as delivered on first GET, (9) Frontend /companion route shows onboarding wizard if no profile, chat UI if profile exists, (10) PWA manifest at /manifest-companion.json and service worker at /sw-companion.js both accessible (HTTP 200).

features_verified.chat_saudi_dialect: ✅ POST /api/companion/chat returns Saudi dialect reply with user's name
features_verified.chat_memory_saved: ✅ Both user and assistant messages saved to companion_memory
features_verified.reminder_create: ✅ POST /api/companion/reminders creates reminder with pending status
features_verified.reminder_list: ✅ GET /api/companion/reminders returns all reminders sorted by trigger_at
features_verified.reminder_firing: ✅ GET /api/companion/pending returns due reminders and marks them fired
features_verified.reminder_daily_repeat: ✅ Daily reminders advance trigger_at by 1 day when fired
features_verified.proactive_trigger: ✅ POST /api/companion/trigger-proactive generates and queues proactive message
features_verified.proactive_pending: ✅ GET /api/companion/pending returns proactive messages, marks delivered on first GET
features_verified.frontend_chat_tab: ✅ Chat UI with input, send button, message bubbles
features_verified.frontend_reminders_tab: ✅ Reminder form with title, time, repeat, add button, list with delete
features_verified.frontend_profile_tab: ✅ Profile editor with all fields, save, share, logout buttons
features_verified.frontend_tabs_navigation: ✅ All 3 tabs (محادثة, منبّهات, ملفّي) clickable and switch content

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM Key for chat)
